name: skillrank-web
//overrides: postcss and sharp reach us only transitively through next. next 16.2.11 still pins postcss 8.4.31 and sharp ^0.34.5, both of which carry advisories, so force the patched versions. sharp is next's OPTIONAL image-optimization dep and this app never uses next/image (no next/image import, no images block in next.config.mjs), so the out-of-range bump is inert here.
//engines: sharp >=0.35 requires Node >=20.9.0; pin the floor so the Vercel project's Node version cannot silently drop below it.
